metadata.scenario: A caller asks for pricing on daily home health aide visits. When given the quote, they express strong concern about the cost, saying "that seems really expensive" and "I can't afford that." They ask about discounts or payment plans. Frustrated tone throughout.

segments.text: Thank you for calling CareFirst Home Health, this is Margaret speaking. How can I assist you today?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Hi, Margaret. My name is Jennifer Taylor. I'm looking for some companion care for my elderly grandmother.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Of course, Jennifer. I’d be happy to help with that. Can you tell me a bit more about her needs?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Yes, she needs help with daily activities like bathing, dressing, and just some companionship throughout the day.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: That sounds important. We offer personal care assistance and companion care services.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Great! Can you tell me about the pricing for those services?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Sure! Our personal care assistance is priced between $28 and $35 per hour, and our companion care is $25 to $30 per hour.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Wow, that seems really expensive.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: I understand your concern, Jennifer. It can add up depending on how many hours you need each day.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Yeah, I really can't afford that. Is there any way you can offer discounts or payment plans?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Currently, we don’t have specific discounts, but we can discuss options like scheduling fewer hours per day or looking into state assistance programs.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: I just need to find a way to make this more affordable. I feel frustrated about the costs.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: I completely understand, and I want to help you find a solution that works.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: What if I only need a caregiver for a few hours each day? Would that help with costs?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Yes, reducing the number of hours can significantly help. We can also consider our respite care, which is $30 to $38 per hour.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: That might work, but I still need to think about it.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Absolutely, take your time. Would you like me to send you some information about our services and options?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Yes, please. That would be helpful.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Great! Can I confirm your email address to send the details?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Sure, it’s jennifer.taylor@example.com.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Thank you, Jennifer. I’ll send that over right away. Would you like to schedule a follow-up call to discuss further?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Yes, I think that would be best. Maybe next week?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: How about I call you Monday at 10 AM?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: That works for me.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Perfect! I’ll talk to you then. Thank you for calling, Jennifer.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Thank you, Margaret. Have a good day.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: You too! Goodbye!
segments.speaker: local party
